name: Iceland (Regent's standard, 1941–1944)

colors.symbolism: the field of the state flag
the cross fimbriation and central shield

description: The Icelandic state flag (swallow-tailed Nordic-cross flag) defaced in the centre with the coat of arms of the Kingdom of Iceland.
history: Standard of the Regent of Iceland (Ríkisstjóri Íslands), an office created on 17 June 1941 after the German occupation of Denmark severed Iceland from the Danish king. Sveinn Björnsson held the office until Iceland became a republic on 17 June 1944, when he was elected the first president.

features.role: Coat of arms of the Kingdom of Iceland
